# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for FLOW. TAB-separated. See PREREQUISITES/.
# FLOW degrades gracefully — when no Ruby >= 3.3.8 is present the flow-mcp server cannot run, but the
# /flow:flow-by-hand markdown runbook operates the roadmap by hand. flow-mcp is a Ruby reference
# (stdlib only, no gems): on the Debian-13 fleet the system `ruby` already satisfies the floor.

install-hint: apt install ruby (Debian 13 ships 3.3.8); macOS: brew install ruby; or rbenv/asdf — runs flow-mcp
apt install jq — parse the MCP/roadmap JSON in hooks
